title: can you write me an email to my preceptor for my IPPE rotation this summer introducing myself, letting them know I don't…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: can you write me an email to my preceptor for my IPPE rotation this summer introducing myself, letting them know I don't have prior pharmacy experience, checking in about onboarding requirements, and determining the specifies of my first start day

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Dear [Preceptor's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. My name is [Your Name] and I will be joining your pharmacy team for my IPPE rotation this summer. I am excited to have this opportunity to learn from you and gain valuable experience in the field of pharmacy.

As a preface, I want to note that I do not have any prior pharmacy experience, and I am eager to learn from you and your team. I am a quick learner and dedicated to making the most of this rotation.

In preparation for my rotation, I wanted to check in with you regarding any onboarding requirements or paperwork that I may need to complete prior to my first day. Please let me know if there is anything I need to do before starting.

Additionally, I wanted to clarify the specific start date for my rotation. Please let me know when my start date will be and any additional details that I may need to know.

Thank you for your time and I look forward to working with you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

turns.speaker: user
